FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG_HZ_ORG_CONTACTS STG_CG_HZ_ORG_CONTACTS,
 (
 select ORG_CONTACT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG_HZ_ORG_CONTACTS
 minus
 select ORG_CONTACT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG_HZ_ORG_CONTACTS
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ORG_CONTACT_ID = STG_CG_HZ_ORG_CONTACTS.ORG_CONTACT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG_HZ_ORG_CONTACTS.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_HZ_ORG_CONTACTS)
